title: Set Up Feature Flags with GrowthBook in Next.js
summary: Add GrowthBook for open-source feature flags and A/B experiments in Next.js — supporting server-side rendering, client components, and edge evaluation.
declaration: I will integrate GrowthBook feature flags into this Next.js project. This covers the SDK setup, server-side flag evaluation in Server Components and API routes, and client-side usage in Client Components. GrowthBook is open-source and can be self-hosted or used via growthbook.io (free tier available). If you prefer a hosted-only solution, LaunchDarkly or Statsig are alternatives.
